LanguageData.EM_CorsairSpine.label: blackflag spineframe
LanguageData.EM_CorsairSpine.description:
This spine keeps gunner discipline and scavenger instinct active as the corsair baseline. Linked effects escalate with combat tempo: boarding momentum during combat, deck gunnery posture in ranged exchanges, marauder frenzy below 45% health in combat, and blackflag audacity while drafted.
-- easyrim
